summary: Completed frontend testing for Shopify-style Theme Editor improvements. All 10 features tested and verified working correctly. The editor loads at /theme-editor with all sections visible, 'Header & Logo' renamed correctly, 'Category Tabs' renamed with 5 max blocks, Sub Navigation with 10 max blocks, Hero Banner with image upload, Store Settings with 28 countries, 27 languages, and 24 currencies, and 'Use template' modal with 4 presets.
critical_code_review_comments: ShopifyStyleEditor.jsx: 'category-tabs' section has max_blocks: 5 with default_blocks for Fashion, Beauty, Baby & Kids, Home & Lifestyle, Premium (lines 295-302)
ShopifyStyleEditor.jsx: 'sub-navigation' section has max_blocks: 10 with default_blocks for 10 items (lines 327-339)
ShopifyStyleEditor.jsx: 'hero-banner' blocks have image_picker for 'Background image' (line 356)
ShopifyStyleEditor.jsx: TEMPLATE_PRESETS has 4 templates: Namshi Style, Minimal Luxury, Flash Sale Focus, Mobile First (lines 128-157)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Theme Editor improvements testing complete. All features verified: 1) 9 sidebar sections visible, 2) 'Header & Logo' renamed correctly, 3) 'Category Tabs' renamed with 5 max blocks, 4) Sub Navigation with 10 max blocks, 5) Hero Banner with image upload option, 6) Store Settings with 28 countries, 27 languages, 24 currencies, 7) 'Use template' modal with 4 presets.

category_tabs_renamed.notes: 'Category Icons' renamed to 'Category Tabs' in sidebar

category_tabs_5_max.notes: Category Tabs section has max_blocks: 5 with 5 default tabs

sub_navigation_10_max.notes: Sub Navigation section has max_blocks: 10 with 10 default items

hero_banner_image_upload.notes: Hero Banner slide settings include 'Background image' picker with file upload capability

store_settings_countries.notes: Store Country dropdown has 28 countries from COUNTRY_CONFIG

store_settings_languages.notes: Default Language dropdown has 27 languages from LANGUAGES array

store_settings_currencies.notes: Default Currency dropdown has 24 currencies from CURRENCIES array

templates_found: Namshi Style - Clean, modern fashion e-commerce layout inspired by Namshi.com
Minimal Luxury - Elegant, minimalist design for premium brands
Flash Sale Focus - Optimized for promotions and sales events
Mobile First - Optimized for mobile shopping experience
use_template_modal.notes: 'Use template' button opens modal with 4 presets

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are live as per main agent context
